sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25425" key="dianu/ttw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διανύττω</orth>, strengthd. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νύττω,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.19</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.70</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
